name: NVZver
description: Vision — a personal, model-agnostic agentic engineering system. Domain-neutral core, on-demand packs.

plugins.name: lsa
plugins.description: Living Spec Architecture: a technology-agnostic spec layer — skills that discover intent, author a grounded spec (EARS + Gherkin), verify it before build and reconcile the diff after, driven by an orchestrator agent. The implementer (Claude Code, Cursor, a human) is external. Loop: discover → specify → verify → delegate → reconcile.

plugins.name: helper
plugins.description: Friendly fact-grounded assistant: `/help` slash command + auto-engaging subagent on user-friction signals (consecutive discover User Verification rejections, free-form `what is X?` mid-flow), with per-signal-type cooldown to prevent nag. Depends on `core` (output discipline) and `lsa` (User Verification reject signal).

plugins.name: manager
plugins.description: Product and project management discipline: shapes vague ideas into structured pitches before the build cycle. Ships a product-manager agent with dynamic domain-role adaptation and a shape skill that hands off to manager:decompose on approval. Depends on `core` (ground-rules, output).

plugins.name: prompt-engineer
plugins.description: Prompt engineering discipline: an agent and commands that review, optimize, and create prompts against a shared quality rule set (ground rules, separation of concerns, KISS/DRY, AI sweep, context budget).
